mnemonics.title: Applications of Text Classification
mnemonics.content: Use S.S.T.L.I. to remember key applications: Spam detection, Sentiment analysis, Topic labeling, Language Identification, Intent detection.

mnemonics.title: Evaluation Metrics
mnemonics.content: Precision is about Exactness (Were the predictions correct?). Recall is about Completeness (Did we find them all?). F1 is their Fair balance.
